underlying: Illinois U.S. Senate 2026 D-R margin in pp (open seat: Stratton D vs GOP, Durbin retiring)
method: AUDIT FIX 2026-04-29: mu 14->16. Anchored on (a) Durbin's 2020 +14.7 margin, (b) Harris winning IL by ~+10 in 2024, (c) Stratton (LG) won the D primary March 2026 with Pritzker's backing -- sitting LG, no major personal vulnerability, (d) open-seat penalty offset by D-friendly 2026 environment + Pritzker machine. Audit raised mu from 14 to 16: D-friendly midterm environment + machine-backed candidate suggests modest outperformance vs Durbin's 2020 baseline rather than open-seat discount. Sigma 7 reflects no general-election head-to-head polls.
notes: Open seat (Durbin retiring) — Stratton won D primary with Pritzker's backing 40.1%. Durbin won 2020 by +14.7. Harris won IL +10 in 2024. Stratton lacks federal incumbency but is a sitting statewide officer with strong machine. Mu=+14 splits the difference. Sigma 7 wider than incumbent races to capture open-seat uncertainty.
